RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT ATTY. ROBERT FRANK KNOX (COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT ROBERT BARNES ) IS A FORMER ASSOCIATE AT THE LAW FIRM OF HOWARD AND RICE AND DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE.
